history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed on JDK 11 due to missing javax.xml.bind.JAXBException, caused by JAXB being unbundled from the JDK in version 11.
history.qwen_rationale: Inserting a POM_PATCH step to bundle javax.xml.bind:jaxb-api and org.glassfish.jaxb:jaxb-runtime on both the compile and annotation-processor classpaths before the JDK 11 migration step resolves the NoClassDefFoundError.

history.qwen_observation: Build failed at bundle_jaxb (JDK 11) with NoClassDefFoundError for javax/annotation/Generated, indicating missing javax.annotation-api on compile and annotation-processor classpaths.
history.qwen_rationale: The previous bundle_jaxb step only added JAXB dependencies. JDK 11+ also removed javax.annotation, which is required by jpamodelgen and other annotation processors. Adding javax.annotation:javax.annotation-api to both compile and annotation processor paths resolves the missing class error and allows the JDK 11 transition to proceed.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation on JDK 11 fails with a NullPointerException during annotation processing, likely caused by an outdated hibernate-jpamodelgen version incompatible with JDK 11's javac internals.
history.qwen_rationale: The search hints indicate that NPEs during compilation on newer JDKs are typically caused by annotation processors pinned at JDK-8-era versions. Adding a force_version for hibernate-jpamodelgen to a JDK-11-compatible release (5.6.15.Final) alongside the existing JAXB/annotation-api bundling should resolve the processor crash.

history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade failed to compile due to missing Spring Framework 6 / Spring Security 6 APIs (Profiles, EnableMethodSecurity, Customizer) and missing Thymeleaf/Prometheus dependencies, indicating a direct jump from SB 2.x to 3.x skipped intermediate compatibility fixes.
history.qwen_rationale: Splitting the Spring Boot migration into two phases (2.7 then 3.3) aligns with empirical trajectory data, allowing the build to stabilize on the final 2.x release before transitioning to Java 17 and Jakarta EE 10. Adding SpringBoot3BestPractices ensures source-level API adjustments are applied alongside dependency updates.

history.qwen_observation: upgrade_spring_boot_2_7 fails because org.springframework.core.env.Profiles was removed in Spring Framework 5.3 (used by SB 2.7), and the recipe does not migrate its usage.
history.qwen_rationale: Skip the intermediate SB 2.7 step and jump directly to UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 at JDK 17, which composes the full migration path and includes recipes to handle Profiles removal and other Spring 6 API changes. This aligns with the operator guidance to use the SB-3 meta-recipe in place of incremental bumps when they fail on API removals.
